about.title: About TinnzStore
about.subtitle: Our story, our dedication, and the talented team behind our premium ultra-low latency hosting server infrastructure.
about.story_p1: Tinnzstore was founded on May 5, 2023 with one simple goal: to provide fast, stable, and reliable hosting and digital solutions for everyone.
about.story_p2: Starting from a self-taught student learning about servers, Linux, and hosting, we saw many users struggling to get quality services at reasonable prices. From that concern, Tinnzstore was born.
about.story_p3: We believe that everyone deserves good infrastructure without sacrificing performance or affordability.
about.timeline_2023_desc: Tinnzstore was officially established and all operations were run independently, from server management and customer support to website and system development.
about.timeline_2024_desc: We learned various technologies such as Linux Server, Docker, Pterodactyl, databases, and web development. During this time, we faced various technical challenges that became valuable lessons for growth.
about.timeline_2025_desc: We faced various obstacles, from server issues, full storage, to backup system failures. But every problem became a drive to build more stable, secure, and professional services.
about.timeline_2026_desc: Tinnzstore began to grow by launching various service lines such as Nexa Hosting, Neon Hosting, and Nano Hosting. We also started developing Baremetal infrastructure, automation systems, monitoring, and better customer service.
about.timeline_now_desc: Today, Tinnzstore has grown into more than just a hosting provider. We continue to innovate to deliver fast, reliable, and relevant digital solutions for our customers. This journey is built on hard work, customer trust, and the spirit to keep learning and growing.
about.value1_desc: Prioritizing performance, security, and stability in every service.
about.value2_desc: Every decision is made to provide the best experience for our customers.
about.value4_desc: Always learning and improving technology for better services.
about.closing_desc: From a student who started everything alone to building a service trusted by thousands of customers, Tinnzstore is proof that big dreams can start from small steps. And this journey continues.
about.team_subtitle: The experts behind the reliability and quality of TinnzStore services.

contact.title: Contact TinnzStore

contact.direct_desc: We are ready to serve your needs through instant communication systems that are friendly and responsive. Our Discord and WhatsApp are active almost all day for quick service.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Write your message or question details here...
contact.form_success_desc: Your message was sent successfully! Our support team will reply to your email within 1x24 hours.
contact.form_error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
contact.discord_community_desc: Get tips, tricks, and the latest updates directly from the Tinnzstore community. Share your experience with thousands of other members.

game_hosting.title: Game Server Hosting
game_hosting.subtitle: Pick your favorite game and build your dream community on a high-spec, low-latency server network with robust DDoS protection.
game_hosting.shared_desc: Fast and stable hosting for various needs — from websites to light applications. Equipped with intuitive control panel, DDoS protection, and high performance with NVMe SSD.
game_hosting.terraria_desc: Play the Terraria multiplayer sandbox adventure without lag with your friends. High-speed gaming servers with instant auto-setup, enterprise DDoS protection, and cloud backup.
game_hosting.samp_desc: High-performance San Andreas Multiplayer (SA-MP) server hosting with AMD EPYC processors, NVMe SSD, and DDoS protection. Intuitive control panel to manage your roleplay or minigame server.
game_hosting.hytale_desc: High-performance Hytale server hosting with AMD EPYC processors, NVMe SSD, and DDoS protection. Intuitive control panel to manage your adventure and creative server.
game_hosting.private_desc: Exclusive private server with full dedicated resources. Perfect for large communities, special projects, or heavy applications that need maximum performance without sharing resources.

shared_hosting.title: Shared Hosting Packages
shared_hosting.subtitle: Fast and stable hosting with high performance, ready to use, and equipped with reliable DDoS protection.
shared_hosting.desc_nexa: Nexa Hosting — stable and affordable server solution with reliable specifications for light to medium needs.
shared_hosting.desc_neon: Neon Hosting — quality hosting at an affordable price, powered by AMD server-class processors for optimal performance.
shared_hosting.desc_nano: Nano — Enterprise Hosting with extreme performance, maximum stability, and uncompromising reliability.
shared_hosting.feature1_desc: Data is automatically saved daily to separate cloud storage, keeping your website safe from data loss risks.
shared_hosting.feature2_desc: Renew your service anytime through the client area without complicated processes and without risk of data deletion.
shared_hosting.feature3_desc: Premium stability with high uptime support for your website to stay online without interruption.
shared_hosting.choose_desc: Shared hosting Minecraft with high performance using AMD Ryzen and EPYC processors. Available in Nexa, Neon, and Nano variants with NVMe storage and DDoS protection. Suitable for community Minecraft servers to large scale.

terraria_hosting.title: Terraria Hosting
terraria_hosting.subtitle: Explore the Terraria multiplayer sandbox world with your friends on a reliable high-speed server without lag.
terraria_hosting.desc: High-performance Terraria hosting — full tModLoader support, instant setup, and 99.9% uptime.
terraria_hosting.feature1: TModLoader Support - Install your favorite Terraria mods easily right from the control panel.
terraria_hosting.feature2: 99.9% SLA Uptime - Guaranteed continuous server online without frequent maintenance disruptions.
terraria_hosting.feature3: Easy Configuration - Access server configuration, world size, difficulty, password via instant web GUI console.
terraria_hosting.choose_desc: High-performance Terraria server hosting with NVMe storage. Supports vanilla and modded servers. Equipped with DDoS protection, backup slots, and port allocation for comfortable gameplay.

samp_hosting.title: SA-MP Server Hosting
samp_hosting.subtitle: High-performance San Andreas Multiplayer (SA-MP) server hosting with DDoS protection and intuitive control panel.
samp_hosting.desc: High-performance SA-MP server hosting — AMD EPYC, NVMe SSD, 17Tbps DDoS protection, and intuitive control panel.
samp_hosting.custom_desc: We are ready to create a custom SAMP hosting package with RAM, CPU, and storage specifications according to your roleplay or minigame server needs.
samp_hosting.choose_desc: SA-MP (San Andreas Multiplayer) server hosting with optimal performance. NVMe SSD for fast loading, DDoS protection, and flexible port allocation. Suitable for roleplay and minigame servers.

hytale_hosting.title: Hytale Server Hosting
hytale_hosting.subtitle: High-performance Hytale server hosting with DDoS protection and intuitive control panel.
hytale_hosting.desc: High-performance Hytale server hosting — AMD EPYC, NVMe SSD, 17Tbps DDoS protection, and intuitive control panel.
hytale_hosting.custom_desc: We are ready to create a custom Hytale hosting package with RAM, CPU, and storage specifications according to your server needs.
hytale_hosting.choose_desc: Hytale server hosting with high specifications for maximum performance. NVMe Gen4 storage, DDoS protection, backup slots, and port allocation. Ready for the Hytale game release.

app_hosting.title: App Hosting
app_hosting.subtitle: Deploy Discord bots, Node.js, Python, Java, or Go applications on a robust cloud server with NVMe SSD speed.
app_hosting.desc: Deploy and run Discord bots, Node.js, Python, Java, or Go applications with high performance and 24/7 uptime.
app_hosting.custom_desc: We are ready to create a custom node package with RAM, CPU Core, and NVMe SSD specifications according to your large-scale bot project needs.
app_hosting.choose_desc: Hosting for applications and bots with high performance. Suitable for Discord bots, Telegram bots, API backends, and small web apps. Equipped with NVMe SSD and DDoS protection.

web_hosting.title: Web Hosting Packages
web_hosting.subtitle: Enjoy high-quality web hosting with cPanel + Softaculous, CloudLinux OS, and free SSL certificates.
web_hosting.desc: Super fast web hosting with cPanel — CloudLinux OS, free SSL, and NVMe SSD. Complete infrastructure ready to use.
web_hosting.feature1_desc: Data is automatically saved daily to separate cloud storage, keeping your website safe from data loss risks.
web_hosting.feature2_desc: Renew your service anytime through the client area without complicated processes.
web_hosting.feature3_desc: Premium stability with high uptime support for your website to stay online without interruption.
web_hosting.infra_desc: Complete infrastructure ready to use with cPanel, CloudLinux, and free SSL for your website needs.
web_hosting.choose_desc: Web hosting with CloudLinux OS, Free SSL, and high performance. Suitable for business websites, online stores, blogs, and news portals. Equipped with DDoS protection and automatic backups.

private_hosting.title: Private Hosting Packages
private_hosting.subtitle: Dedicated solution with exclusive resources for large-scale projects. Maximum performance without sharing resources.
private_hosting.specs_spectrum_desc: We are preparing something special for you
private_hosting.desc_atomic: Atomic — entry-level dedicated hosting with AMD EPYC Milan processor for stable and affordable needs.
private_hosting.desc_catalyst: Catalyst — balanced dedicated hosting with AMD EPYC Genoa processor for optimal performance.
private_hosting.desc_spectrum: Spectrum — flagship dedicated hosting with AMD Ryzen 9 9950X processor for extreme uncompromising performance.
private_hosting.feature1_desc: Data is automatically saved daily to separate cloud storage, keeping your server safe from data loss risks.
private_hosting.feature2_desc: Renew your service anytime through the client area without complicated processes.
private_hosting.feature3_desc: Premium stability with dedicated resources for maximum performance.
private_hosting.choose_desc: Private hosting with dedicated resources for maximum performance. NVMe SSD storage, unlimited backups, and Singapore/Malaysia server locations. Suitable for businesses, large communities, and mission-critical applications.

cloud_vps.title: Cloud VPS Packages
cloud_vps.subtitle: High-performance server infrastructure with AMD EPYC processors, instant activation, and reliable DDoS protection.
cloud_vps.uptime_desc: 99% uptime SLA, full replacement warranty, support 24/7.
cloud_vps.term2: Strictly prohibited from CPU Mining / Crypto Mining activities.
cloud_vps.term3: Strictly prohibited from illegal activities such as DDoS, port scanning, spamming, or Hacking.
cloud_vps.term4: Service is fully renewable without losing IP data.
cloud_vps.term5: Optimally used for Minecraft servers, Pterodactyl panels, Docker, and web hosting servers.
cloud_vps.term6: Full replacement warranty & unlimited replacement in case of hardware issues.
cloud_vps.term7: Uses reliable hardware architecture that is far different in performance from cheap regular VPS.
cloud_vps.term8: Reliable 24/7 technical support always ready to help with your server issues.
cloud_vps.choose_desc: Cloud VPS with AMD EPYC Milan and Genoa processors, high-speed NVMe storage, and enterprise DDoS protection. Available with DDR4 or DDR5 RAM options. Ideal for hosting, development, and production workloads.

hardware.title: Infrastructure Hardware
hardware.subtitle: Our Global Datacenter — Strategic nodes across Southeast Asia. Enterprise hardware, tier-1 connection, and 99.9% uptime.
hardware.topology_desc: Real-time TinnzStore global infrastructure status — monitor latency, node availability, and connection routes.
hardware.topology_scroll: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan
hardware.deploy_desc: Choose the infrastructure that suits your needs — from flagship to edge node.
hardware.flag_desc1: Baremetal — exclusive physical server, maximum raw performance, no virtualization. Ideal for heavy workloads.
hardware.flag_desc2: Virtual Machine — isolated resources, flexible, and efficient. Suitable for light to medium services.

hardware.node_desc_sg: Singapore node for wider Southeast Asia coverage. Tier-1 connection with low latency across Asia.
hardware.node_desc_my: Kuala Lumpur node for Malaysia and regional coverage. Enterprise infrastructure with direct connection to Singapore and Jakarta.

slider.shared_desc: Fast and stable hosting for various needs — Nexa, Neon & Nano plans with premium AMD Ryzen performance.
slider.private_desc: Dedicated solution with exclusive resources for large-scale projects. Maximum performance without sharing resources.

sponsor.title: Level Up Your Community
sponsor.subtitle: TinnzStore supports the growth of Indonesian gaming communities. We are ready to be part of your journey.
sponsor.transparency_desc: Read all terms before submitting a sponsorship application to TinnzStore.
sponsor.term1_desc: Applicant servers are expected to have an active community or show good development potential, be managed responsibly, and operate on games supported by TinnzStore.
sponsor.term2_desc: Servers must display credit "Sponsored by TinnzStore" on the server, description, info, or social media during the active sponsorship period.
sponsor.term3_desc: TinnzStore has the right to publish the name and logo of sponsored servers as part of its portfolio and service promotion.
sponsor.term4_desc: Sponsorship is valid according to mutual agreement. Renewal can be submitted at least 7 days before the sponsorship period ends.
sponsor.term5_desc: Sponsored servers must not promote content containing SARA, violence, or illegal content. TinnzStore reserves the right to revoke sponsorship at any time if violations occur.
sponsor.term6_desc: Sponsorship applications are made through TinnzStore Admin Discord. Include the server name, game, member count, and reason for application when contacting us.
sponsor.cta_desc: Contact TinnzStore admin via Discord and submit your server now. Free, easy, and fast.

sponsor_form.title: Submit Sponsorship & Partnership
sponsor_form.subtitle: Fill out the form completely and accurately. The TinnzStore team will review your application within 1-3 business days.
sponsor_form.community_type_placeholder: Minecraft, GTA RP, Discord Community, etc.
sponsor_form.cooperation_service_placeholder: Game Hosting, Bot Hosting, VPS, etc.
sponsor_form.benefits_label: What will your community provide to TinnzStore as a sponsor?
sponsor_form.benefits_placeholder: Example: Display TinnzStore logo on website, create sponsor channel, social media promotion...
sponsor_form.reason_label: Why should TinnzStore sponsor or partner with your community?
sponsor_form.extra_how_did_you_know: How did you find out about TinnzStore?
sponsor_form.extra_how_did_you_know_placeholder: Discord, Google, Friend, Social Media, etc.
sponsor_form.extra_used_before: Have you used TinnzStore services before?
sponsor_form.agreement_label: I declare that all information provided is true and accountable.
sponsor_form.success_desc: Your sponsorship application has been submitted. The TinnzStore team will review your application within 1-3 business days. Please ensure your WhatsApp and Discord are reachable.
sponsor_form.error: Failed to submit application. Please try again or contact us via Discord.

sponsor_data.project_s_desc: A zombie apocalypse-themed Minecraft Roleplay series full of tension and mystery. The story unfolds through conflict, survival strategies, and character relationships. Each episode delivers a haunting atmosphere that keeps viewers intrigued.
sponsor_data.kitasmp_desc: This series draws inspiration from various famous SMPs such as BHC, BL, and others, with a deeper approach to storyline, characters, and plot development designed in a structured manner. The main goal of Kita SMP is to present stories that can be enjoyed, followed, and felt by the audience.
sponsor_data.cobblesouls_desc: A private Minecraft server with a Pokémon theme (Cobblemon) offering a unique adventure in a world full of exploration. Players can catch, train, and battle various Pokémon. Supported by an active community that makes the gaming experience even more exciting.
sponsor_data.minerverse_desc: An emotional story of a teenager named Malo on a journey to find the meaning of life. He struggles to keep his name remembered as time goes by. This story delivers a profound message about hope and memories.

bare_metal.title: Bare Metal Server
bare_metal.subtitle: Dedicated servers with full control, maximum performance, and enterprise-grade infrastructure with no resource sharing.
bare_metal.desc_intel_core: Latest-gen Intel Core i5, i7, and i9 servers with high single-threaded performance, ideal for gaming servers, real-time applications, and high clock speed workloads.
bare_metal.desc_intel_xeon: Intel Xeon Scalable servers with enterprise performance, high core counts, and ECC RAM support for heavy server workloads, virtualization, and data centers.
bare_metal.desc_amd_ryzen: AMD Ryzen 5 servers with superior power efficiency and affordable pricing, perfect for entry-level dedicated servers, web applications, and software development.
bare_metal.feature1_desc: Complete server control with root access and hardware customization tailored to your specific needs.
bare_metal.feature2_desc: Enterprise-grade DDoS protection, dedicated firewall, and full hardware isolation for maximum security.
bare_metal.feature3_desc: Technical team available 24/7 with highest priority to handle all your bare metal infrastructure needs.
bare_metal.interest_desc: Bare Metal servers are still in development. Register your interest and get the latest updates plus early bird pricing.
bare_metal.tab_all_desc: All dedicated server options in one view. Compare specifications and choose the one that best suits your infrastructure needs.
bare_metal.choose_desc: Dedicated bare metal server with maximum performance for your heaviest workloads. Intel Xeon and AMD EPYC processors available with large ECC RAM and NVMe SSD. Ideal for large databases, rendering, and enterprise applications.
bare_metal.need_help_desc: Our team is ready 24/7 via WhatsApp
